docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SCHILDER, COOPER SCHILDER, ZIHAN AS TO DEFENDANT DCO MISSION BAY LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DCO MISSION BAY LP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF COOPER SCHILDER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ZIHAN SCHILDER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY COOPER SCHILDER, HUSBAND. DEFENDANT DCO MISSION BAY LP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ELLINGTON DIAS, COMMUNITY DIRECTOR. THE COURT ORALLY CORRECTS THE DEFENDANT'S NAME FROM DCQ TO DCO MISSION BAY LP. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHILDER, COOPER SCHILDER, ZIHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DCO MISSION BAY LP $3,365.29 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,515.29, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT $865.29 REFUND OF DEPOSIT, $2500 FOR EMOTIONAL DISTRESS CAUSED BY MOLD IN UNIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
